dailyNews.title: Biden wanted to drive reliable energy 'into a ditch,' says Trump Energy Secretary
dailyNews.description: Energy Secretary Chris Wright claimed Tuesday that the Biden administration was driving the U.S. energy system "into a ditch" through massive subsidies.
